---
description: Crear la primera tarea del proyecto a partir del contexto inicial
agent: control-orchestrator
---

Lee `control/CLAUDE.md`, `control/project_context.md`, `control/jury_and_demo_goals.md`, `control/PROJECT_TECHNICAL_REQUIREMENTS.md`, `control/WORKFLOW_STATE.md` y `workbench/WORKBENCH_STATE.md`.

Redacta la primera versión de `control/next_task.md` y actualiza `control/WORKFLOW_STATE.md`.
